posts.text:
Can you build a better offseason than your team's GM? 🏈🤖

AiNFL GM lets you manage any NFL team's salary cap, sign free agents, make trades, and run a full mock draft.

Free. No signup.

ainflgm.com

Think you could run an NFL front office? Prove it.

AiNFL GM gives you real salary cap numbers, real free agents, and a full 7-round mock draft.

No downloads. No accounts. Just football.

ainflgm.com

Every NFL team. Real cap numbers. Real free agents. Real draft picks.

AiNFL GM is the most complete offseason simulator on the web — and it's completely free.

ainflgm.com

Your friends argue about what their team should do this offseason.

You can actually show them.

ainflgm.com 🏈

NFL free agency is wild. But what if YOU were the GM?

Sign players. Cut dead weight. Trade up in the draft. All with real 2026 cap data.

Try it free: ainflgm.com

AFC North GMs, let's see what you've got.

🟠 Bengals: $31.3M cap, pick #10
🟤 Browns: $21.1M cap, picks #6 AND #24
🟡 Steelers: $22M cap, pick #21
🟣 Ravens: $28.5M cap, pick #14

Run your team: ainflgm.com

NFC East is loaded with cap space this offseason.

🟢 Eagles: $40.1M
🔵 Giants: $25.8M, pick #5
🔵 Cowboys: $18.8M, picks #12 AND #20
🟤 Commanders: $61.7M, pick #7

Build your roster: ainflgm.com

AFC South teams have some big decisions to make.

🔵 Texans: $31.3M, pick #28
🔵 Colts: $42.1M (no 1st rounder)
⚫ Jaguars: $7.2M (cap crunch!)
🔵 Titans: $57.5M, pick #4

You make the calls: ainflgm.com

NFC North might be the toughest division to manage.

🔵 Lions: $30.5M, pick #17
🟢 Packers: $28.6M (no 1st rounder)
🟣 Vikings: $5.9M, pick #18
🟠 Bears: $1.2M, pick #25

Can you make it work? ainflgm.com

AFC West offseason breakdown:

⚫ Raiders: $24.7M, pick #1 overall
🟡 Chargers: $62.1M, pick #22
🟠 Broncos: $22M, pick #30
🔴 Chiefs: $10.9M, picks #9 AND #29

Who has the best offseason? You decide: ainflgm.com

NFC South is wide open.

🔴 Buccaneers: $40.7M, pick #15
⚫ Saints: $17.3M, pick #8
🔵 Panthers: $14.1M, pick #19
🔴 Falcons: $22.1M (no 1st rounder)

Rebuild or reload? ainflgm.com

NFC West has some fascinating cap situations.

🔴 49ers: $39.2M, pick #27
🔵 Rams: $19.6M, pick #13
🟢 Seahawks: $44.1M, pick #32
🔴 Cardinals: $54.1M, pick #3

Run any team's offseason: ainflgm.com

AFC East arms race:

🟢 Jets: $43.8M, picks #2 AND #16
🔴 Patriots: $42.2M, pick #31
🔵 Bills: -$6.4M (over the cap!)
🟢 Dolphins: $8.7M, pick #11

Can you fix the Bills' cap? ainflgm.com

🏈 Mock Draft Mode

Run a full 7-round NFL mock draft with AI-powered picks. Trade up, trade down, or let the board fall to you.

Every pick. Every round. Every team.

ainflgm.com/draft

💰 Salary Cap Tracker

See every team's real 2026 cap space. Cut players. Restructure contracts. Clear room for free agency.

All the cap math, done for you.

ainflgm.com/cap

📝 Free Agency Simulator

Browse the full 2026 free agent class. Sign players to your team with realistic contracts.

Watch your cap space update in real time.

ainflgm.com/fa

🔄 Trade Engine

Want to move up in the draft? Need to dump a bad contract?

AiNFL GM's trade system lets you swap picks and players between any two teams.

ainflgm.com/trades

🤖 AI Suggestions

Not sure who to draft or sign? Our AI analyzes your team's roster needs and recommends the best moves.

Like having a virtual front office.

ainflgm.com

The Raiders have the #1 overall pick. Who should they take?

👇 Reply with your pick

The Jets have TWO first-round picks (#2 and #16) plus $43.8M in cap space.

Is this the best offseason setup in the NFL? Or will they Jets it up?

Run their offseason yourself: ainflgm.com

The Chargers have $62.1M in cap space — most in the NFL.

Who should they sign? Build your LA roster at ainflgm.com

Titans fans: You have pick #4 and $57.5M in cap space.

Do you draft a QB or build around what you have?

Test both strategies: ainflgm.com

Cowboys have picks #12 AND #20 in the first round.

What's the move? Two starters? Trade up? Trade back for a haul?

Run every scenario: ainflgm.com

Which team has the hardest cap situation to fix in 2026?

A) Bills (-$6.4M)
B) Bears ($1.2M)
C) Vikings ($5.9M)
D) Jaguars ($7.2M)

Try to fix them all at ainflgm.com

Hot take: The team that wins this offseason won't be a team that spends big in free agency — it'll be the team that nails the draft.

Run your own draft and prove it: ainflgm.com/draft

The Browns have two first-round picks (#6 and #24) and $21.1M in cap space.

Is this finally the year Cleveland puts it together? You be the GM: ainflgm.com

Unpopular opinion: Having too much cap space is actually a problem.

Teams like Washington ($61.7M) and Tennessee ($57.5M) are under pressure to spend wisely or waste it.

How would you spend it? ainflgm.com

Every year, some GM makes a trade that changes the entire draft.

In AiNFL GM, that GM is you.

Trade picks, trade players, reshape the board.

ainflgm.com/trades

The salary cap is just a number... until you're $6.4M over it like the Bills.

Who do you cut? Who do you restructure? Can you save the roster AND stay competitive?

ainflgm.com 💸

Draft night is the most exciting night in football.

But what if you could run draft night for ANY team, right now?

All 7 rounds. AI opponents. Real prospects.

ainflgm.com/draft 🏈
